name: Real Texas Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the beef and cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Rub each cube with 1 tablespoon chili powder and 4 tablespoons olive oil.
3. Marinate in the refrigerator for several hours or overnight.
4. Heat remaining oil in a stew pot and add as much meat as will fit in one layer.
5. Sauté until browned on all sides, then remove to a bowl.
6. Repeat the process with the remaining meat in batches.
7. When all the meat is browned, add the onion and sauté until softened.
8. Return the meat and accumulated juices to the pot and add all remaining ingredients.
9. Cook partially covered over medium heat for 1-15/4 hours.
10. Remove the bay leaf. Serve with sour cream, chopped cilantro, and lime wedges.
